query: Swiss roesti potato cake with a fried egg on top

draft.title: Rösti with Fried Egg
draft.description: Crispy Swiss rösti potato cakes topped with a perfectly fried egg, a simple and hearty meal for any time of day.

steps.text: Grate the peeled potatoes coarsely and squeeze out excess moisture using a clean kitchen towel.
Season the grated potatoes with salt and black pepper and mix well.
Heat half the butter in a large non-stick frying pan over medium heat.
Add the grated potatoes, pressing them down evenly to form a flat cake about 1.5 cm thick.
Cook for about 10 minutes until the bottom is golden and crispy.
Carefully flip the rösti using a plate or lid and slide it back into the pan.
Add the remaining butter around the edges and cook for another 8-10 minutes until golden and cooked through.
In a separate pan, fry the eggs sunny side up or to your preference.
Cut the rösti into quarters and serve each piece topped with a fried egg.
